title: Chopping Board Set with 3 Size(L, M, S), BPA Free Plastic Chopping Boards for Kitchens,Cutting Board Dishwasher Safe with Non-Slip Feet, Drip Juice Groove, Easy Grip Handle-Green
features: 【Premium Food-Grade Material】: Crafted with premium food-grade plastic materials, our chopping boards set are entirely free of BPA and plastic odor—ensuring a safer and more reliable kitchen experience for your family

【Versatile Three-Board Set】: This set includes three distinct coloured chopping boards set (L: 35x25cm, M: 30x20cm, S: 20x15cm), each designed for specific uses like meat, vegetable, bread, fruits or produce to prevent cross-flavoring and enhance kitchen hygiene

【Elegant Frosted Surface & Ergonomic Design】: Featuring a sophisticated frosted texture and smooth rounded edges, our kitchen chopping board offer a comfortable grip and scratch-resistant handling, while the lightweight build makes them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use

【Practical Juice Grooves & Non-Slip Feet】: Equipped with deep juice grooves to contain spills and secure non-slip corners to keep the cutting boards stable during cutting, making meal prep cleaner, safer, and more efficient

【Easy to Clean & Store】: Designed with convenient carry handles and dishwasher-safe durability, these plastic cutting board are effortless to clean, store, and transport—perfect for everyday cooking, travel, or outdoor gatherings
